forecast-period.text: Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
High
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the Barossa Valley in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 31.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Sunny. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Sunny. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Clear. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 34.

Cloudy. High chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the evening then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly in the late afternoon.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Cloudy. High chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly clear. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west. Winds easterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 24 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 36.

Cloudy. High chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers north of Marla, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Marla. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 37.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 27 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 30s.

Cloudy. High chance of rain west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Leigh Creek in the evening. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to 21 to 26 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 35.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 26 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.
